$description: Component tokens for Mobile Navigation Bar component that groups multiple menu items together in a horizontal navigation bar. Supports platform-specific variants (iOS/Android), configurable menu item counts (2, 3, 4, or 5 blocks), optional gesture bar, and various selection styles. References menu-item-navbar component for individual menu items. Figma Reference: Node ID 71-5094

$component.name: Navigation
$component.description: A mobile navigation bar component that contains multiple menu items arranged horizontally. Supports platform-specific designs (iOS and Android), configurable number of menu items (2-5 blocks), optional gesture bar for iOS-style navigation, top border separator, and equal distribution of menu items across the container width. Used as the primary bottom navigation bar in mobile apps.
$component.structure: Container with top border, background, and flex layout. Contains horizontal flex row with multiple menu-item-navbar components (equal distribution with basis-0 and grow). Optional gesture bar at bottom (iOS platform) with handle indicator. Menu items reference menu-item-navbar component tokens.

with-labels.ios: 79px height - iOS platform with labels and gesture bar

without-labels.ios: 56px height - iOS platform without labels and gesture bar

platform.ios: iOS platform design with pill-shaped menu items, optional gesture bar at bottom, 79px height (with labels) / 56px height (without labels)
platform.android: Android platform design with square menu items, no gesture bar, 95px height (with labels) / 72px height (without labels)

menu-item-count.2: Two menu items in navigation bar
menu-item-count.3: Three menu items in navigation bar
menu-item-count.4: Four menu items in navigation bar
menu-item-count.5: Five menu items in navigation bar

label.present: Menu items display labels below icons, increases navigation bar height
label.none: Menu items are icon-only, no labels displayed, reduces navigation bar height

selection-style.with-bg: Selected menu item has icon background
selection-style.bg-top-border: Selected menu item has icon background and top border indicator
selection-style.bg-bottom-border: Selected menu item has icon background and bottom border indicator
selection-style.without-bg: Selected menu item has no icon background
selection-style.badge-top-border: Menu items display badges and selected item has top border
selection-style.badge-bottom-border: Menu items display badges and selected item has bottom border

usage.contexts: Mobile app bottom navigation bars, primary navigation menus, tab bars, mobile app navigation containers
usage.features: Platform-specific designs (iOS/Android), Configurable menu item count (2-5), Equal distribution layout, Optional gesture bar (iOS), Top border separator, References menu-item-navbar component, Flexible selection styles

container.$comment: Container tokens for mobile navigation bar - background, border, and layout

android.description: Mobile navigation bar container background - neutral/white - #ffffff

ios.description: Mobile navigation bar container background - neutral/gray-100 - #f2f4f7

color.description: Mobile navigation bar top border color - neutral/gray-100 - #f2f4f7

width.description: Mobile navigation bar top border width - 1px

shadow.description: Mobile navigation bar shadow - outer sm

menu-items.$comment: Menu items container tokens - references menu-item-navbar component

android.description: Mobile navigation bar gap between menu items - 0px (items touch edges)

ios.description: Mobile navigation bar gap between menu items - auto

gesture-bar.$comment: Gesture bar tokens for iOS platform - optional bottom gesture indicator

background.description: Mobile navigation bar gesture bar container background - neutral/white - #ffffff

height.description: Mobile navigation bar gesture bar container height - 24px

background.description: Mobile navigation bar gesture bar handle background - neutral/gray-800 - #1d2939

height.description: Mobile navigation bar gesture bar handle height - 4px

width.description: Mobile navigation bar gesture bar handle width - 112px (closest token to 108px design value)

radius.description: Mobile navigation bar gesture bar handle border radius - 12px

height.$comment: Height tokens for mobile navigation bar across different variants

with-labels.description: Mobile navigation bar iOS height with labels - 80px (closest token to 79px design value, includes gesture bar)

without-labels.description: Mobile navigation bar iOS height without labels - 56px (includes gesture bar)

with-labels.description: Mobile navigation bar Android height with labels - 96px (closest token to 95px design value)

without-labels.description: Mobile navigation bar Android height without labels - 72px
